title: Realme P4R price and key specifications leaked ahead of India launch
snippet: Realme will soon launch the P4R 5G budget smartphone in India.A new leak suggests that the phone could come with a 6.8-inch HD+ display, 8,000mAh battery, and dual 50MP camera setup.&nbsp;

title: How hackers tricked Meta AI into handing over high-profile Instagram accounts
snippet: Hackers manipulated Meta's AI chatbot to access Instagram accounts without needing victims' email or phone.&nbsp;

title: Anthropic grants EU access to Mythos, the powerful AI that autonomously found 10,000 zero-day flaws
snippet: Anthropic will finally grant the EU access to Mythos. The company has been having discussions with the bloc for weeks and is finally said to be giving in to the pressure to handle its most powerful AI model.&nbsp;

title: These are the laptop price drops that actually caught our attention
snippet: Price cuts on select laptops are making premium features like OLED displays, AI capabilities, powerful processors and long battery life more accessible than before.

title: How iOS 28 is already shaping up to be a much bigger iPhone update than the iOS 27, report reveals
snippet: Apple is developing iOS 28, expected to be significant, alongside iPadOS 28 and macOS 28.&nbsp;

title: Iranian hackers are weaponising ChatGPT and Gemini for cyberattacks on the US and Israel: Report
snippet: Iranian hackers are leveraging AI models like ChatGPT and Gemini to enhance their cyber operations against the US and Israel

title: How a Bengaluru techie's attempt to help with Kannada homework led to a keyboard app for 21 Indian languages
snippet: Bengaluru based developer Krishna Permi has created a keyboard app for iPhone that runs entirely on-device, requires no internet, and collects no user data.

title: AI startup CEO Dan Shipper spent $13,000 on OpenAI Codex in a month, and isn't worried
snippet: Every CEO Dan Shipper says AI is becoming as essential to modern workplaces as laptops and employee benefits, even as usage costs climb sharply.

title: Nvidia launches RTX Spark chip to power Windows PCs with 128GB memory and AI agents
snippet: Nvidia's new RTX Spark chip will enable Windows laptops to run AI agents locally, allowing users to automate tasks and use natural language. The chip features a 20-core Grace CPU and Blackwell RTX GPU, offering up to 1 petaflop of AI performance and 128GB of memory.

title: Australia's CBA flags surging AI costs as tasks grow complex, slams 'work slop'
snippet: Commonwealth Bank of Australia CEO Matt Comyn said businesses globally are likely to tighten ‌scrutiny of artificial ⁠intelligence-related ⁠spending through 2026 as adoption accelerates and pressure mounts to demonstrate returns on investment.

title: Arm says ByteDance, Oracle use its data centre CPU chips
snippet: Speaking at ​the annual ​Computex conference in Taipei, Arm CEO ‌Rene Haas said ​ByteDance and ​Oracle ⁠are customers of AGI central processing units (CPUs).

title: China adds data and AI to trade secret rules to block leaks
snippet: Effective Monday, the Regulations on Trade Secret Protection mark the first time Chinese law protects such digital assets as proprietary secrets, according to state broadcaster China Central Television.

title: Anthropic IPO filing ratifies Wall Street's AI obsession
snippet: Tech stocks continue to lead ​the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500 in a record-breaking market rally, while Elon Musk's SpaceX is set to price its ​IPO this month and Anthropic rival OpenAI, led by Sam Altman, is waiting on deck.

title: AI-driven labour displacement risks to remain low in near term, Bridgewater says
snippet: Adoption remains limited, with fewer ​than 20% of US firms reporting AI use in any business function over ​a two-week period, concentrated ⁠largely in ‌information, technology and professional ​services, Bridgewater ​said citing Census Bureau data.

title: China's Zhipu AI plans to apply for Shanghai's Sci-Tech Board listing
snippet: One of the leading players in China's crowded artificial intelligence sector, Zhipu AI, said the proposed issuance of A shares, each with a ‌nominal value ⁠of 0.10 ⁠yuan, would represent between 2% and 8% of the company's total share capital, or 9.1 million to ​38.8 million shares.

title: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, claiming company concealed serious risks of ChatGPT
snippet: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier said during a news conference that the company suppressed internal safety warnings and deceived users about the true nature and dangers of the product. He said Florida was the first state to sue OpenAI.

title: SEC defends Musk settlement over Twitter, saying it reflects 'compromises'
snippet: In a filing in the Washington, D.C. federal court, the SEC also said in a footnote that the settlement if approved will allow Musk to publicly deny its accusations, reflecting a recent policy ‌change governing defendants ⁠who settle ⁠enforcement actions.

title: Nvidia CEO says has capacity to supply robust CPU and GPU growth
